overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk city highway at night. The player moves from a covered toll area along a busy highway with futuristic vehicles, then transitions to a sidewalk lined with trash and holographic advertisements, encountering pedestrians in a dystopian urban environment.

events.description: futuristic black sedan passes by on the right side of the road
vehicle with bright headlights approaches from the distance through the fog

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the highway overpass toward the illuminated gantry structure ahead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past on the highway with red taillights glowing

entered.detail: tall concrete noise barrier wall with horizontal red stripes running along the left side
massive highway toll gantry with multiple lanes and illuminated signage spanning the road
bright rectangular LED floodlights mounted on the gantry creating light beams through the fog
sleek cyberpunk-style cars with glowing underlights and futuristic silhouettes
tall dark skyscraper with illuminated windows visible above the barrier wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a foggy covered highway section beneath an enormous illuminated toll gantry. The concrete barrier wall runs along the left while futuristic vehicles pass by on the asphalt road, their lights cutting through the thick orange haze.

events.description: brief blackout transition then emerges onto open highway section with metal guardrail on the right
futuristic sports car with glowing blue undercarriage passes closely on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder next to a metal cable guardrail with moderate traffic passing by on the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving at high speed with blue neon underglow

entered.detail: silver metal cable barrier running along the right edge of the highway shoulder
tall metal security fence with horizontal bars beyond the guardrail
tall street lamp with bright white light illuminating the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Moving along an open highway shoulder bordered by a metal guardrail and fence. The scene is enveloped in thick orange fog with streetlights creating diffuse glows. Futuristic vehicles regularly pass by on the left, their headlights and neon underglows visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk under highway overpass with trash accumulation

events.description: transitions from highway shoulder onto concrete sidewalk with accumulated trash bags and dumpsters
encounters first group of pedestrians walking on the sidewalk ahead
passes under large overpass with glowing holographic billboards overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past piles of garbage bags and green dumpsters, approaching pedestrians under the overpass

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket and pants walking toward the camera
individual standing near the dumpsters on the right side

entered.detail: paved pedestrian walkway with white painted markings and curb
large piles of blue and white garbage bags stacked against the fence
large green industrial dumpsters with open lids overflowing with trash
glowing holographic advertisements mounted under the overpass showing promotional images with text
concrete highway overpass overhead with support columns and red accent lighting
tall street lamp with bright light illuminating the sidewalk area

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk under a highway overpass, passing accumulated trash bags and green dumpsters. The area features holographic billboards glowing overhead and several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The metal fence continues along the right side while traffic moves on the highway to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered highway toll area into a gritty, neon-lit urban sidewalk. It begins beneath an enormous illuminated toll gantry, moving past a concrete barrier as futuristic vehicles cut through a thick orange haze. As the camera progresses, the covered section opens into an exposed highway shoulder bordered by a metal guardrail, where streetlights create diffuse glows within the persistent fog. The scene then shifts beneath a highway overpass, transitioning from the open road to a concrete sidewalk lined with trash bags and green dumpsters. Finally, the environment expands into a dystopian streetscape featuring glowing holographic billboards and pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.
